'''Nar Millich''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Major/Legends|major]] who served as a [[Chief of Security/Legends|Security Chief]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Timeline">The [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of the ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]'' is centered around the [[Original trilogy|original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]], which takes place between [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] to between [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].</ref> He worked to gain position and power within the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Navy/Legends|navy]] and believed that gaining the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] favor was a path to success. Millich had [[Color/Legends|dark]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and fair skin.<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nar Millich was mentioned on a card in [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
